MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-01-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS VICENTE SOTO AND EVANGELINA SOTO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE THREE DAY NOTICE DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENT OF CCP 1161. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ROSA SOTO AND DAVID SOTO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE THREE DAY NOTICE DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENT OF CCP 1161. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SOTO, ROSA SOTO, DAVID HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-01-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
